# Buildwise Media

> Marketing run like operations, not like a project. Ad spend in. Revenue out. Verified weekly.

## About

Buildwise Media installs and operates one integrated lead-generation system — Ascend, the Buildwise Revenue Engine — for ambition-disposed service-business owners. We treat marketing as operations: every claim audits against a captured baseline, every connector is checked weekly, and every commitment carries a confidence percentage with a 75% floor.

Founded: 2024
Location: Atlanta, Georgia, USA
Serving: United States (North America)
Operating posture: AI-native, single-product, month-to-month

## Services

- [Ascend — The Buildwise Revenue Engine](https://buildwisemedia.com/services/ascend): Complete AI-native lead-generation system installed and operated. Includes: full multi-page website built to AI-search-era standards (Three-Layer optimization — human, schema, agent); paid acquisition (Meta-primary, expanding to Google + LinkedIn at scale) wired to baseline-first attribution; AI-assisted content production with human QA at the 8/10 quality rubric; integrated operations layer (CRM, analytics, drift detection on every connector, lead attribution pipeline, email/SMS lifecycle); AI business tools configured to client's actual operations; weekly connector audit. Pricing: $7,000/mo total ($6,000/mo BWM management + $1,000/mo included ad spend) + $2,500 one-time Engine Build at signup. Month-to-month — no long-term lock-in. 30 days written notice to cancel. Client owns all assets — website, ad accounts, content, automations.

## Key pages

- [How It Works](https://buildwisemedia.com/how-it-works): Three phases — Audit, Build, Operate. 30-day install timeline.
- [Results](https://buildwisemedia.com/results): Verified outcomes with captured baseline + evidence class per metric.
- [About](https://buildwisemedia.com/about): Marketing-as-operations methodology and company values.
- [Book a Call](https://buildwisemedia.com/book): 15-minute discovery call — qualification first, no sales walkthrough.
- [Privacy](https://buildwisemedia.com/privacy) · [Terms](https://buildwisemedia.com/terms)

## Ideal client profile

Ambition-disposed service-business owners generating $1M–$5M annual revenue in North America. Ambition-vs-fear disposition on AI is the hard filter; revenue band is the soft affordability floor. Industries: home services, trades, specialty contractors, med spas, dental, remodeling, construction, luxury landscaping, custom pools, roofing, HVAC. Owners looking for comfort or a savior are out of ICP — this is for operators who want to run marketing like they run their business.

## Differentiators

- Single-product positioning — one operating system, not six fragmented services
- 30-day install timeline, not 90 — system operational on day 30
- Confidence floor 75% on every commitment — no aspirational marketing language
- Captured baseline on every metric — every claim audits against the source
- Weekly connector audit (Mondays 4am ET) — drift surfaces before clients see it
- Three-Layer website standard — human-readable, schema-readable, agent-readable
- Month-to-month — no long-term lock-in, no hostage situations
- Client owns everything — website, ad accounts, content, CRM data

## Guarantees

- Build-Right Guarantee: if we miss install milestones, we keep working until we hit them, on us.
- Month-to-month engagement structure — renewal decision in client's hands every cycle.
